summary: Tested Market Activity Dashboard with 8 expandable panels. All backend API tests pass (13/13). Frontend tests verify all 8 panels render, expand/collapse correctly, show correct stock data, and navigation to video pages works.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/market-overview returns 200 OK
Backend: Response contains price_movement section with 3 categories (top_gainers, top_losers, hot_stocks)
Backend: Response contains opportunities section with 5 categories (early_bonus, undervalued, best_roi, new_listings, most_traded)
Backend: Each category has correct structure (title, qualifier, icon, items)
Backend: Items have required fields (video_id, title, thumbnail, share_price, ticker, creator_name)
Backend: top_gainers items have positive price_change_percent
Backend: hot_stocks items have shares_sold_percent
Backend: early_bonus items have early_bonus field (1.5, 2.0, or 2.5)
Backend: best_roi items have roi_percent
Backend: most_traded items have txn_count_24h
Backend: Response includes timestamp
Backend: /api/simulate-prices returns 200 OK
Backend: simulate-prices updates market data
Frontend: MarketOverview component renders with data-testid='market-overview'
Frontend: All 8 panels found (top_gainers, top_losers, hot_stocks, early_bonus, undervalued, best_roi, new_listings, most_traded)
Frontend: Panel headers show icon, title, qualifier, item count badge, and top stock preview
Frontend: Clicking panel header expands to show stock items
Frontend: Expanded panels show stock data (rank, thumbnail, title, ticker, creator, price, category-specific metric)
Frontend: Clicking stock item navigates to /video/{video_id}
Frontend: Simulate Prices button works and refreshes data
Frontend: Dashboard loads without errors for authenticated user
critical_code_review_comments: MarketOverview component is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
API returns all 8 categories with correct data structure
Expandable panels have smooth animations and proper state management
Category-specific metrics are correctly displayed (price_change_percent for gainers/losers, shares_sold_percent for hot_stocks, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo user and video data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Market Activity Dashboard with 8 expandable panels is fully functional. All panels (Top Gainers, Top Losers, Hot Stocks, Early Bonus, Undervalued, Best ROI, New Listings, Most Traded) work correctly. Simulate Prices button updates data. Navigation from stock items to video pages works.
